# Pitch deck speaker notes

## Product
Natively is a live conversation copilot for individual operators. It handles interviews, sales calls, lectures, and team meetings with mode-specific prompts and reference files.

## Market
The individual operator wedge is roughly 8 million knowledge workers in the US who pay for productivity tools out of pocket. Cluely and Final Round target the same wedge from different angles.

## Moat
Our moat is the per-mode reference file system plus hybrid local/cloud retrieval. Cluely lacks per-mode reference files and does not currently support local-only operation, which matters in regulated industries. We have a working open-source local Whisper integration and a custom provider scope toggle for privacy-sensitive customers.

## Roadmap
Next six months: first-class custom modes, screen context dynamic actions, and post-call action item extraction with calendar export.

## Risks to call out
We are not SOC2 Type 2 today; Type 1 audit is targeted Q3 2026. We deliberately avoid representing audited financials in investor conversations.
